title: Voigtia australis
taxonomy: Voigtia australis belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is a genus of flowering plants native to Africa. The species Voigtia australis is further classified as a member of the order Gentianales. This classification indicates its close relationships with other plant species within the same order. The family Apocynaceae comprises over 5,000 species of flowering plants worldwide.

The plant is traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
